title: theme — validation rules
description: Named validation rules the module registers via Validator::extend. Applied by observers + form requests before persistence.

rules.name: valid_token_key
rules.purpose: The token_key must match the canonical vocabulary in data/token-vocabulary.json. Structure: ^(color|spacing|typography|radius|shadow|motion|opacity|z_index)(\.[a-z0-9_-]+)+$. The prefix maps to a ThemeTokenType enum case; the tail path must exist under that category's key catalog.
rules.message: The :attribute is not a canonical theme token key. See data/token-vocabulary.json for the allowed vocabulary.

rules.name: valid_token_value_for_type
rules.purpose: The token_value must match the token_type's value schema. Per type: color → hex (#RRGGBB / #RRGGBBAA), rgb/rgba, hsl/hsla, or oklch(); dimension → number + unit (px|rem|em|%); typography.family → font-family string (max 500 chars); typography.weight → 100|200|...|900; typography.size → dimension; radius → dimension; shadow → box-shadow string; motion.duration → number + ms|s; motion.easing → cubic-bezier() or CSS keyword; opacity → 0..1 decimal; z_index → integer.
rules.message: The :attribute value :value is not valid for token_type :type.

rules.name: valid_category
rules.message: The :attribute must be one of platform_default | tenant_custom | brand_forward | high_contrast | minimal.

rules.name: valid_hex_color
rules.purpose: Standalone color format check — hex 6 (#RRGGBB), hex 8 (#RRGGBBAA), rgb()/rgba(), hsl()/hsla(), oklch(). Used inline in schemas + composed into valid_token_value_for_type when token_type=color.
rules.message: The :attribute is not a valid CSS color (accepted: hex, rgb/rgba, hsl/hsla, oklch).

rules.name: valid_dimension_unit
rules.purpose: Dimension values must be a number followed by a supported unit: px | rem | em | %. Zero is allowed unit-less. Used inline in schemas + composed into valid_token_value_for_type when token_type=dimension.
rules.message: The :attribute must be a number followed by px, rem, em, or %; zero is allowed unit-less.

rules.name: valid_accessibility_flags_shape
rules.purpose: The accessibility_flags jsonb must be an object with exactly the four keys: high_contrast (bool), reduced_motion (bool), larger_text (bool), focus_visible_always (bool). No extra keys allowed.
rules.message: The :attribute must be an object with only these boolean keys: high_contrast, reduced_motion, larger_text, focus_visible_always.

rules.name: unique_active_theme_per_tenant_per_mode
rules.purpose: Enforced by a partial unique index at the DB layer + application-level check inside ThemeObserver::updating. Refuses activating a second theme in the same (tenant_id, mode) without first deactivating the prior one. Observer handles the deactivation transactionally.
rules.message: A theme is already active for this tenant + mode. Deactivate the current theme first, or activate this one via /themes/{theme}/activate which handles the swap atomically.

rules.name: unique_slug_per_tenant_namespace
rules.purpose: Preset slugs are unique within their namespace: platform (tenant_id NULL) presets share one namespace; each tenant's custom presets share their own namespace. Enforced by composite unique (COALESCE(tenant_id, 'platform'), slug) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL.
rules.message: A preset with slug :value already exists in the :namespace namespace.

rules.name: contrast_ratio_wcag_aa
rules.purpose: For color pairs (foreground/background), compute WCAG 2.2 relative-luminance contrast ratio; ≥ 4.5:1 for body text / ≥ 3:1 for large text (18pt+ or 14pt+ bold). RULE IS INFORMATIONAL — never blocks a write; surfaces findings as ThemeAccessibilityRecommendationNotification.
rules.message: Color pair :foreground / :background has contrast ratio :ratio which is below WCAG AA (:required required). Consider adjusting or add high-contrast preset.
rules.cross_reference: contracts/service-boundary.md — WCAG 2.2 AA is a recommendation, not a gate.
